title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 159.19 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net long positioning at 77.3% — watch for potential squeeze as institutional sentiment diverges from retail.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD holding above 0.7072 — RBA hiking rates support AUD carry, but watch for growth/risk-off factors dominating.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 19.2 signals normal volatility — not a risk-on environment, but USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break indicates JPY no longer acting as safe haven.

title: Cross-Asset Observation
text: USD/CAD vs WTI Oil correlation break at +0.577 — potential regime signal as CAD historically negatively correlated with oil prices.
